periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: Areas of smoke. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 77. South wind around 6 mph.

periods.name: Saturday
periods.short_forecast: Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 4pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 95. Heat index values as high as 105. South wind 6 to 14 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Saturday Night
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 1am, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 1am and 2am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 77. Heat index values as high as 102. Southwest wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Sunday
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of rain showers between 7am and 11am, then showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny, with a high near 91. Northwest wind 6 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
